title: Structured task output as queryable metadata

tasks.title: Create `plugin/src/types/task-output.ts` with TaskStructuredOutputSchema, FileChangeSchema, DecisionSchema, STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_MAX_BYTES constant (10KB), and exported types. Schema uses .passthrough() to allow extra agent fields. All fields have safe defaults (empty arrays, 0 for counts).
tasks.verification: Created plugin/src/types/task-output.ts with TaskStructuredOutputSchema (filesChanged, testsAdded, testsModified, decisions, followUps, .passthrough()), FileChangeSchema, DecisionSchema, STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_MAX_BYTES (10KB). 15 tests pass in task-output.test.ts.
tasks.summary: Created plugin/src/types/task-output.ts with TaskStructuredOutputSchema (filesChanged, testsAdded, testsModified, decisions, followUps, .passthrough()), FileChangeSchema, DecisionSchema, STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_MAX_BYTES (10KB). 15 tests pass in task-output.test.ts.
tasks.implementation_summary: Created plugin/src/types/task-output.ts with TaskStructuredOutputSchema (filesChanged, testsAdded, testsModified, decisions, followUps, .passthrough()), FileChangeSchema, DecisionSchema, STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_MAX_BYTES (10KB). 15 tests pass in task-output.test.ts.

tasks.title: Add `structured_output: TaskStructuredOutputSchema.optional()` field to TaskSchema in `plugin/src/types/tasks.ts`. Add `structured_output: TaskStructuredOutputSchema.optional()` field to TaskCompletedSignalPayloadSchema in `plugin/src/types/signals.ts`. Import from ./task-output.

tasks.summary: Extended TaskSchema with `structured_output: TaskStructuredOutputSchema.optional()` and TaskCompletedSignalPayloadSchema with same field. Added imports from ./task-output. Typecheck passes cleanly.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended TaskSchema with `structured_output: TaskStructuredOutputSchema.optional()` and TaskCompletedSignalPayloadSchema with same field. Added imports from ./task-output. Typecheck passes cleanly.

tasks.title: Create `plugin/src/utils/extract-structured-output.ts` with extractStructuredOutput(text: string): TaskStructuredOutput | null. Logic: regex match last `<adv-output>...</adv-output>`, strip markdown fences, JSON.parse, size check (10KB), TaskStructuredOutputSchema.parse(). Non-blocking: on failure log warning, return null. Create `plugin/src/utils/extract-structured-output.test.ts` with 12+ test cases: no tag, valid full, partial+defaults, invalid JSON, schema fail, multiple tags (last wins), fences, oversized, tag in second field, extra fields passthrough, empty tag, whitespace-only tag.
tasks.verification: Created extract-structured-output.ts with extractStructuredOutput(): regex last-match for <adv-output> tags, fence stripping, JSON parse, 10KB size check, schema validation. Non-blocking: all failures return null with warnings. 13 tests pass.
tasks.summary: Created extract-structured-output.ts with extractStructuredOutput(): regex last-match for <adv-output> tags, fence stripping, JSON parse, 10KB size check, schema validation. Non-blocking: all failures return null with warnings. 13 tests pass.
tasks.implementation_summary: Created extract-structured-output.ts with extractStructuredOutput(): regex last-match for <adv-output> tags, fence stripping, JSON parse, 10KB size check, schema validation. Non-blocking: all failures return null with warnings. 13 tests pass.

proposal.approval_evidence: Narrower reframe of closed programmaticApiSurface change. Scope: optional tag-based structured output extraction from agent task completion, stored as queryable task metadata. Consumer is next ADV phase (review/archive/reflect), not external code. Backward compatible, non-blocking, internal-only.

design.approval_evidence: Design validated by independent adv-researcher (CAUTION verdict). Two findings incorporated: (1) added missing third signal path (adv_task_completed), (2) used specific schema instead of z.unknown(). No user-value tradeoffs remain — all design questions resolved autonomously. Validator confirmed: no circular imports, workflow bundle safe, signal backward compatible, no ReDoS risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved task graph: 7 tasks (2 schema, 1 extraction, 3 integration, 1 verification). v1 scope: extraction+storage only.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Review passed: 10/10 AC met, 0 blockers, 0 issues. 2 non-blocking suggestions (defensive try/catch scope, verification-only test). All 2172 tests pass. Implementation matches approved agreement.

release.approval_evidence: User sign-off. 10/10 AC met, 2172 tests pass, review clean. 2 non-blocking suggestions deferred to follow-up.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal has no Success Criteria section. How will we know this change is done?
Proposal has no Scope section. What files and modules will be affected?
